scripts.build: esbuild packages/bridge/src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/agent-protocol-bridge.mjs
scripts.build:relay: esbuild packages/relay/src/server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/agent-protocol-relay.mjs
